name: x-image
description: Generate complete X article covers and article illustrations with one built-in ImageGen call per asset.

interface.longDescription: Generate complete X article covers, article heroes, explainers, data visuals, and vertical illustrations. Codex selects ratio, style, and layout, then calls built-in ImageGen exactly once per asset with no image post-processing.
defaultPrompt: 给这篇 X 文章生成一张封面
为这篇文章生成一张正文解释图
